nasb.text: Moreover, the angel of the Lord said to her, “I will greatly multiply your descendants so that they will be too many to count.”

esv.text: The angel of the Lord also said to her, “I will surely multiply your offspring so that they cannot be numbered for multitude.”

cnv.text: 耶和華的使者又對她說：“我必使你的後裔人丁興旺，多到不可勝數。”

ccb.text: 又说：“我必使你的后代多得不可胜数。”

csbs.text: 耶和华的使者又对她说：“我将使你的后裔大大增多，多得无法数清。”
